name: MySearch-Proxy
description: Multi-provider search aggregator with intelligent routing. Unifies Tavily, Firecrawl, Exa, and xAI/Social search with fallback mechanisms and parallel execution.
author: skernelx

functionality.justification: All core features working; multi-provider routing intelligent; fallback mechanisms solid

documentation.justification: Clear SKILL.md + bilingual docs EN+ZH; minor gaps in troubleshooting

security.justification: No hardcoded secrets; credentials via env vars; thread-safe key management; no vulnerabilities

maintenance.justification: Active repo, 52 commits, latest 2026-03-19, zero open issues, v0.1.7

usefulness.justification: Solves real pain point; broadly applicable; improves upon single-provider alternatives

uniqueness.justification: First skill to aggregate 4+ providers with intent-based routing; differentiates from Vincent-Brave, Baidu Search

code_quality.justification: Modular Python 3.10+, type hints, dataclasses, 598 LOC tests, passes compilation

features: Aggregates 4+ search providers: Tavily, Firecrawl, Exa, xAI/Social
Intelligent provider routing based on search intent
Edge case handling (GitHub URLs, anti-bot detection)
